creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
Request for maintainership of net-p2p/xnap, to hopefully avoid its
	removal from ports.

Fix: Patch included below.
How-To-Repeat: 	Port is currently marked as DEPRECATED=Napster service does not 
	exists [sic] anymore, and is set to expire.
	This port still works with the Opennap network, and is still
	fetchable from SF.
